name: low-mild-ambiguity
description: Single-sentence prompt with one ambiguous term match ('improvements' contains 'improve'). Ambiguity density at 1/36=2.8%, bucket=45.

input.prompt: This code has some issues. Can you help me analyze it and suggest specific improvements? I need a solution that handles edge cases properly and returns correct results. Please provide the function with proper error handling.

notes: Structural=100, Ambiguity bucket=45 (1 match, density=0.028), Volatility bucket=30 (256>2*50=100). Score=36.
